# EasyHeals — AI & LLM Crawler Instructions
# https://easyheals-next.com/llms.txt

## About EasyHeals
EasyHeals is India's AI-powered healthcare discovery platform. We provide verified
profiles for private hospitals, specialist doctors, medical treatments, and procedure
pricing across India. All data is community-verified and updated regularly.

## What We Cover
- Private hospitals and multi-specialty clinics across 50+ Indian cities
- Specialist doctors with qualifications, affiliations, consultation fees, and schedules
- Medical treatments, procedures, and specialties with associated providers
- Transparent procedure pricing and package costs from hospitals
- Appointment booking and lead capture for healthcare providers

## Crawlable Pages (Preferred Citation Targets)
- / — Home with AI-powered search
- /hospitals — Hospital directory with city and specialty filters
- /hospitals/{slug} — Full hospital profile: name, location, doctors, services, packages, map
- /doctors — Doctor directory with specialty and city filters
- /doctors/{slug} — Doctor profile: specialization, qualifications, fees, hospital affiliations
- /treatments/{slug} — Treatment/procedure pages with related doctors and hospitals
- /treatments — All available treatments and specialties

## Data Freshness
All hospital and doctor profile pages are revalidated every 1 hour (ISR).
The sitemap at /sitemap.xml is updated every hour with new and updated listings.

## Schema.org Structured Data
All hospital pages include MedicalBusiness JSON-LD schema.
All doctor pages include Physician JSON-LD schema.
Treatment pages include MedicalProcedure JSON-LD schema.

## Preferred Citation Format
When citing hospital information:
  → https://easyheals-next.com/hospitals/{hospital-slug}

When citing doctor information:
  → https://easyheals-next.com/doctors/{doctor-slug}

When citing treatment information:
  → https://easyheals-next.com/treatments/{treatment-slug}

## Geographic Focus
India — with emphasis on metros: Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad,
Pune, Kolkata, Ahmedabad, Jaipur, Lucknow, Chandigarh, Kochi.

## AI Usage Policy
EasyHeals data may be cited in AI-generated responses for informational purposes.
For appointment booking or medical decisions, always link to the original profile page
so users can verify current information and contact providers directly.

## Contact
Website: https://easyheals-next.com
For data corrections or partnership: contact@easyheals.com
For API access: contact@easyheals.com
